productDisplayName: Urban Yoga Men's Yoga Beige Track Pant
description: CompositionStretchable beige track pants made of 100% cotton with spandex technology,soft elastic waist band with logo imprinted drawstring and concealed pockets on the sideFit ComfortWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Wear these comfort fit yoga pants to your next yoga session and feel the difference. The softly elasticated drawstring waist can be easily adjusted to customise the pant to your fit, while the panels on the side give extra stretchability to facilitate easy movement. The side pockets can easily hold your money and keys on the way to your yoga venue. Specially designed with spandex for easy movement, the cotton fabric keeps you dry, comfortable and fresh. Any hard seams like zippers or buttons have been carefully avoided for a comfort feel to the body. The brand tag has been printed and consciously not stitched so that nothing comes between you and comfort. Team this with yoga tees or kurtas for total comfort. Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 43"Height-6.2”, Waist – 32”, Hips – 40”
